outages.boundary: Palo Verde Rd and Oglesby Rd
outages.comments: Severe weather in the area has damaged equipment. We are working to restore power as quickly and safely as possible.

outages.boundary: Kasba Cir. to Chaparral Rd. and Casa Blanca Dr. to Tamanar Way.
outages.comments: Multiple customers have reported an outage in this area. We are investigating and will provide an update once we know more.  Thank you for your patience.
